name: ethicalhive
description: EthicalHive — collective AI integrity through adversarial self-audit. Advisory pre-delivery checks (Groundedness, Sycophancy, Confirmation, Anchoring, Scope-creep) with Chain-of-Verification. Every Claude Code instance is a sensor. Cases flow to the hive. The validator evolves from real-world usage.
author: Alexandru Dan <alexandru.dan@lexsoft.lu>
